prompts.prompt: Create a date range picker for booking a hotel stay. Users should pick check-in and check-out dates. Past dates should be disabled.
Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
A GitHub-style issue label picker with color dots and search
Show a dashboard widget with loading → error → data states
Build an email inbox view with a table showing sender, subject, date, and a preview snippet. Add row selection with checkboxes and a bulk actions bar that appears when items are selected.
A sidebar that becomes a bottom sheet on mobile
An autocomplete input that fetches suggestions from an API as you type
Create a new page for a settings dashboard. It should have a header with the app title, a sidebar for navigation, and a main content area. Use the Astryx theme system.
Build a comparison table header where each column has a plan name heading and a price. The 'Enterprise' plan should have visually larger display-style typography compared to the other plans.
I have a section of my app that needs a different theme than the rest — like a dark sidebar next to a light content area. How do I nest themes in Astryx?
